LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: MATTER ARGUED. AT CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT RULES ON DEFENDANTS CRAIG HOM, AILEEN CUSTODIO AND JOANN CUSTODIO'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO DEFENDANT JOANN CUSTODIO. PLAINTIFF WAS GIVEN THE OPPORTUNITY TO AMEND COMPLAINT TO PLEAD MORE FACTS AS TO THE FRAUD ALLEGATION. THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO DEFNEDANTS AILEEN CUSTODIO AND CRAIG HOM ON THE GROUNDS THAT THE COURT LACKS JURISDICTION OVER THE SUBJECT OF THE CAUSE OF ACTION. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

WITH REGARDS TO THE NON-BANKRUPT DEFENDANT (JOANN CUSTODIO)PARAGRAPHS 13 & 14 IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. AMENDED COMPLAINT TO BE FILED BY JULY 17, 2013. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: RICHARD KRAMER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-18-2013 Sustained
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: MAXWELL KEITH, ESQ., 415.387.1531, FOR PLAINTIFF SAMUEL LUCAS.
CHERYL ROUSE, ESQ., 415.575.9444, FOR DEFENDANTS CRAIG HOM, AILEEN CUSTODIO AND JOANN CUSTODIO.

RULING: MATTER ARGUED. AT CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT RULES ON DEFENDANTs CRAIG HOM, AILEEN CUSTODIO and JOANN CUSTODIO's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO DEFENDANT JOANN CUSTODIO. PLAINTIFF WAS GIVEN THE OPPORTUNITY TO AMEND COMPLAINT TO PLEAD MORE FACTS AS TO THE FRAUD ALLEGATION. THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO DEFNEDANTS AILEEN CUSTODIO AND CRAIG HOM ON THE GROUNDS THAT THE COURT LACKS JURISDICTION OVER THE SUBJECT OF THE CAUSE OF ACTION. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

Off Calendar Sep-17-2013 Continued To Oct-18-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS CRAIG HOM, AILEEN CUSTODIO and JOANN CUSTODIO'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued on the Court's own motion to October 18, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2013 Continued To Sep-18-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-02-2013 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MAXWELL KEITH, TEL. NO. 387-1531 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. CHERYL ROUSE, TEL. NO. 525-9444 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANTS CRAIG HOM, AILEEN CUSTODIO & JOANN CUSTODIO's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend solely to allege additional facts that if true would justify a determination that the debt was not discharged in bankruptcy court. WITH REGARDS TO THE NON-BANKRUPT DEFENDANT (JOANN CUSTODIO)PARAGRAPHS 13 & 14 IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. AMENDED COMPLAINT TO BE FILED BY JULY 17, 2013. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Richard Kramer, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/RAK)
